endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/internalappsharing/{packageName}/artifacts/apk
endpoints.description: Uploads an APK to internal app sharing. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See [Timeouts and Errors](https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors) for an example in java.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/internalappsharing/{packageName}/artifacts/bundle
endpoints.description: Uploads an app bundle to internal app sharing. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See [Timeouts and Errors](https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors) for an example in java.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/deviceTierConfigs
endpoints.description: Returns created device tier configs, ordered by descending creation time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/deviceTierConfigs
endpoints.description: Creates a new device tier config for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/deviceTierConfigs/{deviceTierConfigId}
endpoints.description: Returns a particular device tier config.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{DEVICETIERCONFIGID}} with a real devicetierconfigid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits
endpoints.description: Creates a new edit for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}
endpoints.description: Gets an app edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an app edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks
endpoints.description: Lists all current APKs of the app and edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks
endpoints.description: Uploads an APK and adds to the current edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/externallyHosted
endpoints.description: Creates a new APK without uploading the APK itself to Google Play, instead hosting the APK at a specified URL. This function is only available to organizations using Managed Play whose application is configured to restrict distribution to the organizations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/deobfuscationFiles/{deobfuscationFileType}
endpoints.description: Uploads a new deobfuscation file and attaches to the specified APK.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEOBFUSCATIONFILETYPE}} with a real deobfuscationfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Fetches the expansion file configuration for the specified APK.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Uploads a new expansion file and attaches to the specified APK.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: PUT /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Updates the APK's expansion file configuration to reference another APK's expansion file. To add a new expansion file use the Upload method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Patches the APK's expansion file configuration to reference another APK's expansion file. To add a new expansion file use the Upload method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/bundles
endpoints.description: Lists all current Android App Bundles of the app and edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/bundles
endpoints.description: Uploads a new Android App Bundle to this edit. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See [Timeouts and Errors](https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors) for an example in java.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/countryAvailability/{track}
endpoints.description: Gets country availability.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/details
endpoints.description: Gets details of an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: PUT /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/details
endpoints.description: Updates details of an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/details
endpoints.description: Patches details of an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings
endpoints.description: Lists all localized store listings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings
endpoints.description: Deletes all store listings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Gets a localized store listing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: PUT /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a localized store listing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Deletes a localized store listing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Patches a localized store listing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}
endpoints.description: Lists all images. The response may be empty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}
endpoints.description: Uploads an image of the specified language and image type, and adds to the edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}
endpoints.description: Deletes all images for the specified language and image type. Returns an empty response if no images are found.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}/{imageId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the image (specified by id) from the edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGEID}} with a real imageid. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/testers/{track}
endpoints.description: Gets testers. Note: Testers resource does not support email lists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PUT /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/testers/{track}
endpoints.description: Updates testers. Note: Testers resource does not support email lists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/testers/{track}
endpoints.description: Patches testers. Note: Testers resource does not support email lists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks
endpoints.description: Lists all tracks.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks/{track}
endpoints.description: Gets a track.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PUT /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks/{track}
endpoints.description: Updates a track.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks/{track}
endpoints.description: Patches a track.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}:commit
endpoints.description: Commits an app edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/edits/{editId}:validate
endpoints.description: Validates an app edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/generatedApks/{versionCode}
endpoints.description: Returns download metadata for all APKs that were generated from a given app bundle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VERSIONCODE}} with a real versioncode. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/generatedApks/{versionCode}/downloads/{downloadId}:download
endpoints.description: Downloads a single signed APK generated from an app bundle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DOWNLOADID}} with a real downloadid. Replace {{VERSIONCODE}} with a real versioncode. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/inappproducts
endpoints.description: Lists all in-app products - both managed products and subscriptions. If an app has a large number of in-app products, the response may be paginated. In this case the response field `tokenPagination.nextPageToken` will be set and the caller should provide its value as a `token` request parameter to retrieve the next page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/inappproducts
endpoints.description: Creates an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Gets an in-app product, which can be a managed product or a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: PUT /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Updates an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Deletes an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Patches an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/orders/{orderId}:refund
endpoints.description: Refunds a user's subscription or in-app purchase order. Orders older than 1 year cannot be refunded.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/pricing:convertRegionPrices
endpoints.description: Calculates the region prices, using today's exchange rate and country-specific pricing patterns, based on the price in the request for a set of regions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/products/{productId}/tokens/{token}
endpoints.description: Checks the purchase and consumption status of an inapp item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/products/{productId}/tokens/{token}:acknowledge
endpoints.description: Acknowledges a purchase of an inapp item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/products/{productId}/tokens/{token}:consume
endpoints.description: Consumes a purchase for an inapp item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}
endpoints.description: Checks whether a user's subscription purchase is valid and returns its expiry time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:acknowledge
endpoints.description: Acknowledges a subscription purchase.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels a user's subscription purchase. The subscription remains valid until its expiration time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:defer
endpoints.description: Defers a user's subscription purchase until a specified future expiration time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:refund
endpoints.description: Refunds a user's subscription purchase, but the subscription remains valid until its expiration time and it will continue to recur.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:revoke
endpoints.description: Refunds and immediately revokes a user's subscription purchase. Access to the subscription will be terminated immediately and it will stop recurring.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/subscriptionsv2/tokens/{token}
endpoints.description: Get metadata about a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/purchases/voidedpurchases
endpoints.description: Lists the purchases that were canceled, refunded or charged-back.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/reviews
endpoints.description: Lists all reviews.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/reviews/{reviewId}
endpoints.description: Gets a single review.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/reviews/{reviewId}:reply
endpoints.description: Replies to a single review, or updates an existing reply.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions
endpoints.description: Lists all subscriptions under a given app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions
endpoints.description: Creates a new subscription. Newly added base plans will remain in draft state until activated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}
endpoints.description: Reads a single subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a subscription. A subscription can only be deleted if it has never had a base plan published.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a base plan. Can only be done for draft base plans. This action is irreversible.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers
endpoints.description: Lists all offers under a given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers
endpoints.description: Creates a new subscription offer. Only auto-renewing base plans can have subscription offers. The offer state will be DRAFT until it is activated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers/{offerId}
endpoints.description: Reads a single offer
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers/{offerId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a subscription offer. Can only be done for draft offers. This action is irreversible.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers/{offerId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing subscription offer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers/{offerId}:activate
endpoints.description: Activates a subscription offer. Once activated, subscription offers will be available to new subscribers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}/offers/{offerId}:deactivate
endpoints.description: Deactivates a subscription offer. Once deactivated, existing subscribers will maintain their subscription, but the offer will become unavailable to new subscribers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}:activate
endpoints.description: Activates a base plan. Once activated, base plans will be available to new subscribers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}:deactivate
endpoints.description: Deactivates a base plan. Once deactivated, the base plan will become unavailable to new subscribers, but existing subscribers will maintain their subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}/basePlans/{basePlanId}:migratePrices
endpoints.description: Migrates subscribers who are receiving an historical subscription price to the currently-offered price for the specified region. Requests will cause price change notifications to be sent to users who are currently receiving an historical price older than the supplied timestamp. Subscribers who do not agree to the new price will have their subscription ended at the next renewal.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{BASEPLANID}} with a real baseplanid.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/subscriptions/{productId}:archive
endpoints.description: Archives a subscription. Can only be done if at least one base plan was active in the past, and no base plan is available for new or existing subscribers currently. This action is irreversible, and the subscription ID will remain reserved.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/systemApks/{versionCode}/variants
endpoints.description: Returns the list of previously created system APK variants.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VERSIONCODE}} with a real versioncode. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/systemApks/{versionCode}/variants
endpoints.description: Creates an APK which is suitable for inclusion in a system image from an already uploaded Android App Bundle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VERSIONCODE}} with a real versioncode. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/systemApks/{versionCode}/variants/{variantId}
endpoints.description: Returns a previously created system APK variant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VERSIONCODE}} with a real versioncode. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{VARIANTID}} with a real variantid.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/systemApks/{versionCode}/variants/{variantId}:download
endpoints.description: Downloads a previously created system APK which is suitable for inclusion in a system image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VERSIONCODE}} with a real versioncode. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{VARIANTID}} with a real variantid.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets an existing external transaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /androidpublisher/v3/{name}
endpoints.description: Removes all access for the user to the given developer account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /androidpublisher/v3/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates access for the user to the developer account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/{name}:refund
endpoints.description: Refunds or partially refunds an existing external transaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/{parent}/externalTransactions
endpoints.description: Creates a new external transaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/{parent}/grants
endpoints.description: Grant access for a user to the given package.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /androidpublisher/v3/{parent}/users
endpoints.description: Lists all users with access to a developer account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /androidpublisher/v3/{parent}/users
endpoints.description: Grant access for a user to the given developer account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
